title: TriggerForge Config
description: Shape of config/config.php once the 'return [...]' array is loaded. PHP ingests this as a nested associative array; the same structure serialised to JSON matches this schema. Used by the CLI validator, the (upcoming) web config editor, and IDEs for autocomplete.

_app.description: Reserved top-level app-level branding. Not a category — skipped by the item iterator and the webhook URL whitelist.

title.description: Overrides the page <title> and the header logo (plain text only, no HTML pass-through).

background_image.description: URL (http(s)) or relative assets/ path to a background image; painted behind a dark overlay.

additionalProperties.description: Any non-reserved top-level key is the display name of a category. Value is a list of item entries. The list may also carry a reserved '_meta' key (string-keyed alongside the numeric item keys, which PHP arrays allow and which JSON serialises as an object) with optional per-category icon and color.

color.description: Hex accent color for the category header's left border (e.g. #ef4444).

itemId.description: Optional stable identifier. Recommended for production configs so favourites and cooldowns survive reordering. Allowed characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, _, -. Omit to fall back to the positional {categoryId}-{index} scheme.

iconName.description: Boxicons class name (https://boxicons.com/). Default 'bx-bolt' for webhooks, 'bx-link-alt' for links. Must be a single class token.

httpHeaders.description: Extra request headers. Keys are header names, values are strings. Host/Content-Length are managed by cURL and will be overridden.

name.description: Button label shown in the UI.

description.description: Tooltip text (rendered as the button's title and aria-label).

webhook_url_test.description: URL to POST when TEST mode is active.

webhook_url_prod.description: URL to POST when PROD mode is active.

cooldown.description: Per-webhook cooldown duration in milliseconds. Overrides the global 10 000 ms default. 0 disables the cooldown for this button.

confirm.description: Whether the confirmation modal is shown before firing. Default: true. Set false for low-risk webhooks where the extra click is annoying.

payload.description: Custom JSON payload merged with the default body {triggered_at, source, triggered_by}. Config values win on key collision. Must NOT contain untrusted user input.

undo_url.description: Optional URL called when the user clicks 'Undo' on the success toast. Only shown when set.

url.description: External URL opened in a new tab. Only http/https/mailto/tel protocols are executed client-side.

chainItem.description: Planned type: runs a sequence of other webhook items with optional delays between steps. Not yet implemented — reserved for future use.

ref.description: Item id of the target webhook (must match an existing 'id').

delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait AFTER this step completes, before firing the next step.
